creator: andrew@sally.ugh.net.au
text:
rc.conf refers to an rc.conf man page in section 8 (the reference occurs on line 108). This man page dosnt seem to exist. Are the features in rc.conf documented anywhere? Most things you can track down what they do by reading the rest of the rc scripts but things that just control a sysctl line...unless they are documented somewhere...

Fix: 

Document the rc.conf features...
How-To-Repeat: 
more /etc/rc.conf
108 G
